brand.name: EasyCasa
brand.tagline: Buy, sell, and rent — pay only for the services you use, from a licensed agency.

home.title: Property, without the markup.
home.subtitle: Pay only for the services you use — from a licensed agency. Search the map across thousands of homes in every Italian region.

search.title: Search properties
search.emptyHint: Try widening the price range or removing a filter.
search.empty: No properties found. Widen your search or remove a filter.

add.title: List your property
add.subtitle: Describe the listing with the full EasyCasa taxonomy so buyers can find it.
add.signInRequiredBody: You must sign in before listing a property.
add.signInHint: You need to sign in to publish.
add.successBody: Your draft was created and published when allowed by your account role.
add.previewHint: Check everything below. Publishing will create the listing, upload photos, then make it public.
add.mediaPlaceholder: Add up to 12 photos (JPEG, PNG or WebP).

hints.province: Select the province first, then the municipality from the list.
hints.city: ISTAT list for the selected province — pick from the list to avoid typos.
hints.sellerType: Private sellers are EasyCasa’s default positioning.
hints.financing: Optional. Select every NIB mode you will accept (no traditional mortgage required).
hints.leaseType: Required for rentals — drives contract and RLI rules.
hints.characteristics: Optional. Select amenities that apply to this property.
hints.images: Up to 12 images (JPEG/PNG/WebP). Uploaded when you publish.
hints.videoUrl: Optional YouTube, Vimeo, or direct video URL.

errors.title: Enter a title (at least 3 characters).
errors.transactionType: Choose how the property changes hands.
errors.transactionTypes: Select at least one transaction type.
errors.leaseType: Choose a lease type for rentals.
errors.yearBuilt: Enter the year the property was built.
errors.videoUrl: Enter a valid video URL (or leave empty).
errors.signInRequired: Sign in to publish your listing.
errors.publishFailed: Saved as draft, but publish failed. Check your account role.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

smartlink.title: SmartLink — shareable page
smartlink.body: Create a branded public link to send this listing to a client. Views are counted in aggregate (no IP stored).
smartlink.includeBand: Include the market valuation band on the SmartLink
smartlink.shareMessage: View this property on Easy Casa Italy
smartlink.errorGeneric: Could not manage SmartLink. Try again.

footer.disclosure: A mediation fee (provvigione) applies only when a deal closes through our work, and is always stated in the mandate.

pricing.title: À la carte pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay only for the services you use. No hidden percentage on search or listing.
pricing.disclosure: When you instruct us as a licensed mediator, a provvigione may apply on successful conclusion — always disclosed in the incarico before you sign.
pricing.empty: Catalog unavailable right now. Try again shortly.

valuationBand.title: Market valuation
valuationBand.subtitle: Indicative comparison of the asking price against the area market band.
valuationBand.sourceProvisional: Provisional estimate based on comparable listings
valuationBand.disclaimer: Indicative estimate only; not a formal appraisal.
valuationBand.provisionalNotice: Provisional data: the band is based on few comparable listings in the area.
valuationBand.unavailableArea: Valuation not available for this area.
valuationBand.unavailableMissingSurface: Enter the floor area to see the market band.
valuationBand.a11ySummary: Area {zone}. Selling price {selling}, fair market {fair}, out of market {high}. Asking price: {asking}. Status: {status}.

smartlink.positioning: Buy, sell or rent homes and rooms with no agency commission
smartlink.viewStatsHint: Public aggregate count (total / daily unique visitors).
smartlink.revokedBody: This SmartLink was revoked by the owner.
